name: Passive Rail Tag Network
blurb: RFID tags embedded in maglev track provide millimeter-precise train positioning without external sensors.

name: Vacuum Tube Asset Tracker
blurb: RFID readers lining vactrain tubes track cargo pods and passengers in real time.

name: Superfluid Glucose Microchannel
blurb: Zero-viscosity fluid channels transport interstitial glucose to sensors without lag or clotting.

name: Frictionless Carbon Sorbent Loop
blurb: Superfluid helium cools DAC sorbent beds, boosting CO₂ capture yield at lower energy cost.

name: Document Revival Engine
blurb: Foundation model reads fax streams and converts legacy documents into structured digital records instantly.

name: Embodied Task Architect
blurb: Foundation model plans and dispatches multi-step physical tasks across heterogeneous robot fleets.

name: Cascaded Distillation Network
blurb: Foundation model compresses its own knowledge into smaller neural networks tuned for specific tasks.

name: Sparse Expert Foundation Stack
blurb: MoE routing selects domain experts within a foundation model, slashing inference cost at scale.

name: Transit Demand Oracle
blurb: Foundation model forecasts vactrain ridership and reroutes pods before congestion forms.

name: Battery-Aware Inference Scheduler
blurb: Foundation model shifts heavy computation to periods when LFP grid storage is at peak charge.

name: Orbital Cargo Broker Agent
blurb: Autonomous agent negotiates payload slots on space elevators and coordinates ground-to-orbit logistics.

name: Biometric Intent Verifier
blurb: Intelligent agent cross-checks biometric signals against stated goals to authenticate autonomous decisions.

name: On-Chain Agent Escrow
blurb: Intelligent agents hold and release blockchain funds only when verifiable task conditions are met.

name: Grid-Balancing Energy Agent
blurb: Autonomous agent arbitrages sodium-ion battery charge cycles to stabilize renewable grid supply.

name: Cryogenic Revival Coordinator
blurb: Intelligent agent monitors cryonics storage facilities and initiates revival protocols when medical criteria are met.

name: Nano-Synaptic Compute Fabric
blurb: Nanoscale molecular junctions mimic synaptic firing, enabling neuromorphic chips at atomic density.

name: Swarm Nano-Assembly Network
blurb: Multi-agent coordination directs nanobot teams to construct macroscopic objects atom by atom.

name: Perovskite Defect Optimizer
blurb: AI models crystal grain boundaries in perovskite cells and prescribes synthesis tweaks to raise efficiency.

name: Reactor Autonomy Supervisor
blurb: AI continuously monitors SMR sensor arrays and adjusts reactivity without human intervention.

name: Phenotype Reconstruction Model
blurb: MoE network predicts full organism traits from partial clone genomes, guiding selective expression.

name: Geothermal-Fission Hybrid Plant
blurb: Co-located nuclear and geothermal sources share turbines and grid ties, smoothing output around the clock.

name: Photonic Reactor Control Bus
blurb: Fiber-optic photonic circuits relay sensor data inside nuclear reactors immune to electromagnetic interference.

name: Deep-Bore Tether Anchor
blurb: Geothermal wells double as anchor foundations for space elevator ground terminals in volcanic zones.

name: Seismic Identity Gateway
blurb: Geothermal monitoring arrays generate site-unique seismic signatures used to authenticate grid access.

name: Geothermal REC Ledger
blurb: Blockchain tokenises geothermal renewable certificates, enabling real-time trading of verifiable clean energy.

name: Thermal Buffer Battery Array
blurb: Sodium-ion banks absorb surplus geothermal output, releasing stored power during peak demand.

name: Geothermal Cryogenic Vault
blurb: Waste heat from geothermal drives an absorption chiller that maintains cryonics storage at near-absolute zero.

name: Fax-Over-Maglev Backbone
blurb: Maglev guideway fiber carries legacy fax protocols, connecting remote offices with zero latency document relay.

name: Hard-Copy Vactrain Manifest
blurb: Fax terminals at vactrain stations automatically print cargo manifests as pods dock.

name: Biomarker Data Marketplace
blurb: Patients sell anonymised liquid biopsy data via cryptocurrency, funding research while controlling access.

name: Orbital Settlement Currency
blurb: Satellite-relayed cryptocurrency enables real-time payments across off-grid communities and space habitats.

name: Quantum-Neuromorphic Co-Processor

name: Planetary Atmosphere Neural Mesh

name: Aerogel-Packaged Neural Core
blurb: Aerogel casing insulates neuromorphic chips against thermal swings, enabling deployment in extreme environments.

name: Neuromorphic DAC Controller
blurb: Spike-based neuromorphic chips run direct-air-capture valve logic at a fraction of GPU energy.

name: Maglev Ascent Corridor
blurb: Maglev track runs inside a space elevator tether, accelerating climber cars without cables or rockets.

name: Vacuum Tether Express
blurb: Vactrain tunnels extend from elevator anchor cities, letting cargo skip surface transit entirely.

name: Adaptive Trait Expert Selector
blurb: MoE model routes genetic variant queries to specialist sub-networks predicting trait expression.

name: In-Motion MRI Rail Scanner
blurb: MRI coils integrated into maglev tunnels scan passengers for pathologies during routine commutes.

name: Cold-Fusion Maglev Drive

name: Autonomous Rail Traffic Mind
blurb: AGI coordinates entire maglev networks, predicting failures and rerouting trains milliseconds ahead of faults.

name: Commuter Biofeedback Rail
blurb: Wearables report passenger stress and fatigue to maglev systems that adjust speed and cabin climate.

name: Guided-Rail Autonomous Pod

name: Sparse-Expert MRI Interpreter

name: Graphene Glucose Tattoo

name: Solar-Powered Glucose Patch

name: Metabolic AR Dashboard

name: Holographic Glucose Chart

name: Multilingual Glucose Coach

name: Graphene Photonic Interconnect

name: Biometric Therapy Gatekeeper
